name: 035HanPanaitte!
description: This project is designed to support meme coin communities through collaborative initiatives. When partnering with another meme project, a portion of the transaction fees generated during the collaboration period is allocated back to the partner as a form of ecosystem support. The goal is to create mutually beneficial relationships rather than one-sided promotion. In addition, the project may hold partner tokens as a symbolic and strategic gesture of alignment. This is not intended as price control or financial guarantee, but as a demonstration of long-term commitment and shared participation within the broader meme culture ecosystem. The structure is designed to be reciprocal — partner projects are encouraged to engage in similar forms of collaborative support. Through this mutual alignment, both communities can sustain engagement, strengthen cultural momentum, and promote long-term development. By focusing on cooperation rather than competition, the project aims to build a networked meme culture where projects grow together rather than in isolation.
